ddls:
CREATE TABLE "religious_traditions" (
  "tradition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religious tradition */,
  "tradition_name" TEXT /* Name of the religious tradition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the religious tradition */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the religious tradition */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the tradition was founded */,
  "number_of_followers" INTEGER /* Estimated number of followers globally */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where this information is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tradition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., Less than $30,000) */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for this level */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for this level */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the income levels are applicable */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the income levels were defined */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where this information is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the demographic factor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic factor */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where this information is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tradition_income_data" (
  "tradition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the religious tradition */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income level */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals in this income level */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used to calculate the percentage */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the data is collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where this information is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tradition_id", "level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_income_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tradition_demographic_data" (
  "tradition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the religious tradition */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic factor */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used to calculate the value */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the data is collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where this information is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tradition_id", "factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is hidden */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is private */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tradition_income_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "tradition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the religious tradition */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income level */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals in this income level */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used to calculate the percentage */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of this version */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the data is collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where this information is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_income_data_versions_tradition_id FOREIGN KEY ("tradition_id") REFERENCES religious_traditions ("tradition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_income_data_versions_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_income_data_versions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tradition_demographic_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "tradition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the religious tradition */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic factor */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used to calculate the value */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of this version */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the data is collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where this information is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_demographic_data_versions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_demographic_data_versions_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES demographic_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tradition_demographic_data_versions_tradition_id FOREIGN KEY ("tradition_id") REFERENCES religious_traditions ("tradition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contact regarding the data source */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
